findings.description: Section IDs do not follow sequential order matching source document structure. The source has 4 h2-level sections in order: 注意点, 要求, 全体構造, 各機能単位の構造. The knowledge file assigns IDs s1, s4, s2, s3 respectively — meaning 要求 (2nd section) is labeled s4, 全体構造 (3rd) is s2, and 各機能単位の構造 (4th) is s3. Expected sequential assignment would be s1, s2, s3, s4.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 headings in order: 注意点 (------), 要求 (----), 全体構造 (--------), 各機能単位の構造 (----------------)

findings.description: PascalCase class name `SQLStatement` is referenced in the source for s4 (要求) content — specifically `SQLStatement#setFetchSize` and `SQLStatement#addBatch` — but is absent from the s4 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「プリフェッチ(SQLStatement#setFetchSize)ができる。」「バッチ更新(SQLStatement#addBatch)ができる。」
